calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant AKG TRADE, INC., a California corporation and doing business as "Gadget World" and also known as "Zagg"

Dept: 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:33:18 a.m. and concluding at 9:51:46 a.m. (D505).

John P. Byrne, Esq. representing Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P., a Delaware limited partnership.
Defendant AKG TRADE, INC., a California corporation and doing business as "Gadget World" and also known as "Zagg" not appearing.
Darren Iverson, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Counsel summarizes and provides proof.
The Court examines the witness. Witness testifies.
Counsel confirms that the requested judgment will resolve the entire action.
Witness confirms that declaration and statements made are true and correct.

Good cause appearing, the Court grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P., a Delaware limited partnership and against Defendant AKG TRADE, INC., a California corporation and doing business as "Gadget World" and also known as "Zagg" as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover the following from the Defendant.
Past Due Rent $83,950.00
Holdover Damages $7,560.00
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $622.00
Total Judgment $94,957.00

The rental agreement is cancelled. The lease is forfeited.
Proposed Judgment signed and filed.

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-01-2024 Continued To Sep-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
